title: MLB Analytics
tagline: Baseball landing page with bounty-style predictions and sport-level navigation
summary: MLB now publishes its own home page, daily prediction board, and prediction method page inside the shared multi-sport site.

title: NBA Analytics
tagline: Player cards, college scouting, and daily market pages
summary: The active production workspace with player archetype decks, valuation views, college pages, and daily prediction boards.

title: NFL Analytics
tagline: Football workspace scaffold for model, data, and frontend expansion
summary: The NFL area now has a dedicated frontend entry point so football pages can ship under their own namespace as they come online.
